positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a golden retriever puppy joyfully running through a field of wildflowers at dawn. The composition should be centered and highly graphic, using bold silhouette techniques and clean, contrasting line work. The color palette should be limited to creams, burnt orange, sapphire blue, and emerald green, providing a retro, joyful, and slightly vintage screen-print aesthetic. The puppy and wildflowers should form clear, distinguishable shapes with strong contrast against a clean, solid background. Perfect for apparel print, vector art quality, highly detailed, flat graphic design, clean edges, vibrant.
